derive.title: Request history idle
derive.detail: No mounted save slot is active, so there is no request chain to enumerate.

derive.title: Request history pending
derive.detail: A mounted save slot is present, but the repo-side request-history index is not yet available.

derive.title: Request history ready
derive.detail: The mounted save slot request chain is enumerated directly from the repo history index.

guardrails: Request history presentation should summarize the index-driven chain rather than exposing only raw preview output.
The chain remains descriptive and read-oriented.
Boards remain excluded because Boards never use terminal/saves/.
